# MuleSoft RPA Bot

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.7) of RPA Bot documentation.
> See [RPA Bot llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-bot/llms-full.txt) for all the RPA Bot documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configuring RPA Bot](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-bot/latest/configuration.md)
- [Hardware and Software Requirements](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-bot/latest/hardware-software-requirements.md)
- [RPA Bot Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-bot/latest/index.md)
- [Installing RPA Bot](https://docs.mulesoft.com/rpa-bot/latest/installation.md)
